message:
refactor(search-core): simplify diversity env parsing with is_none_or

diversity.rs:
- Replace map_or(true, ...) with is_none_or() for DIVERSITY_ENABLED_ENV
  parsing, making the intent clearer: diversity is enabled when the env
  var is absent or when its value is not a falsy string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
